uk: Св. священномученика Атеногена і десятьох учнів його.
saints.en: Hieromartyr Athenogenes and his ten disciples

rubrics:
Вечірня: катизма чергова. На «Господи, взиваю» 6 стихир: 3 Октоїха, 3 свщмч., Сл., І нині: богород. Прокімен дня. Стиховня Октоїха. По «Отче наш»: тропар свщмч., Сл., І нині: богород. відпустовий за гласом тропаря свщмч. і за днем тижня. Відпуст середній з помин. свщмч.
Утреня: по «Бог Господь»: тропар свщмч. (2), Сл., І нині: богород. відпустовий за гласом тропаря свщмч. Катизми черг., сідальні Октоїха. Пс. 50. Канон Октоїха і свщмч. На 9-ій пісні – «Чеснішу від херувимів». По 9-ій – світильний Октоїха, Сл.: світильний свщмч., І нині: його богород. Стиховня Октоїха. По «Отче наш»: тропар свщмч., Сл., І нині: богород. за гласом тропаря свщмч. і за днем тижня. Відпуст середній з помин. свщмч.
Часи: на 1-му – дня; на 6-му – храму; на 3-му та 9-му – свщмч.
Літургія: вся Служба – дня. Ап. – 1 Кор. 147 зач.; 10, 28 – 11, 7. Єв. – Мт. 69 зач.; 16, 24-28.

troparion_en.text: By sharing in the ways of the Apostles, / you became a successor to their throne. / Through the practice of virtue, you found the way to divine contemplation, O inspired one of God; / by teaching the word of truth without error, you defended the Faith, / even to the shedding of your blood. / Hieromartyr Athenogenes, entreat Christ God to save our souls.

kontakion_en.text: Following the Master’s teachings, / as a shepherd you laid down your life for the flock of Christ. / Therefore, we praise you and your ten disciples, who under your guidance and in the fear of God suffered with you. / With His life-creating right hand / the Lord has granted you a crown. / Pray to Him for us all, Hieromartyr Athenogenes.

matched_oca_saint: Hieromartyr Athenogenes, Bishop of Heracleopolis, and his ten disciples

oca_saints.name: Hieromartyr Athenogenes, Bishop of Heracleopolis, and his ten disciples

troparion.text: By sharing in the ways of the Apostles, / you became a successor to their throne. / Through the practice of virtue, you found the way to divine contemplation, O inspired one of God; / by teaching the word of truth without error, you defended the Faith, / even to the shedding of your blood. / Hieromartyr Athenogenes, entreat Christ God to save our souls.

kontakion.text: Following the Master’s teachings, / as a shepherd you laid down your life for the flock of Christ. / Therefore, we praise you and your ten disciples, who under your guidance and in the fear of God suffered with you. / With His life-creating right hand / the Lord has granted you a crown. / Pray to Him for us all, Hieromartyr Athenogenes.

oca_saints.name: Martyrs Paul and two sisters, Chionia (Thea) and Alevtina (Valentina), at Cæsarea in Palestine

troparion.text: Your holy martyrs O Lord, / through their sufferings have received incorruptible crowns from You, our God. / For having Your strength, they laid low their adversaries, / and shattered the powerless boldness of demons. / Through their intercessions, save our souls!

oca_saints.name: Martyr Antiochus the Physician of Sebaste

troparion.text: Your holy martyr Antiochus, O Lord, / through his sufferings has received an incorruptible crown from You, our God. / For having Your strength, he laid low his adversaries, / and shattered the powerless boldness of demons. / Through his intercessions, save our souls!

kontakion.text:
(Podoben: “You sought the heights...”)
You appeared as a bright star announcing Christ with your radiance,  / which is repulsive to this world, O Martyr Antiochus;  / extinguishing the allure of false gods,  / you enlighten the faithful, /  always interceding for us all.

troparion.text:
(Podoben: “Joseph was amazed...”)
Your lamb Julia, / calls out to You, O Jesus, in a loud voice: / “I love You, my Bridegroom, / and in seeking You, I endure suffering. / In baptism I was crucified so that I might reign in You, / and I died so that I might live with You. / Accept me as a pure sacrifice, / for I have offered myself in love.” / Through her prayers save our souls, since You are merciful.

kontakion.text:
(Podoben: “You sought the heights...”)
Finding your most revered temple to be a source of healing for our souls,  / we the faithful cry out to You with a loud voice:  / “O most renowned Virgin Martyr Julia,  / entreat Christ God unceasingly on behalf of us all.”

troparion.text: Your holy martyr John, O Lord, / through his sufferings has received an incorruptible crown from You, our God. / For having Your strength, he laid low his adversaries, / and shattered the powerless boldness of demons. / Through his intercessions, save our souls!

kontakion.text:
(Podoben: “You sought the heights...”)
You appeared as a bright star announcing Christ with your radiance,  / which is repulsive to this world, O Martyr John;  / extinguishing the allure of false gods,  / you enlighten the faithful, /  always interceding for us all.

oca_saints.name: Icon of the Mother of God of Chirsk-Pskov

troparion.text: O Most Holy Theotokos, /   we your servants, having you as an Indestructible wall1  /  and a fountain of miracles, the power of our enemies is overthrown.  /  Therefore, we entreat you:  /  "Give peace to your city and great mercy to our souls."

kontakion.text: As a sign from your holy Icon,  / you granted a marvelous victory over the enemies of your city;  / therefore, we cry out to you: "Rejoice, O Virgin, the boast of Christians."
